labels.name: Name
labels.title: Title
labels.monthPolicy: If the day is not in the month

page.title: Settings
page.description: Manage app preferences, backups, sync, exports, and local app details.

general.title: General
general.description: Set how the app looks and how money amounts appear across your workspace.

about.title: About
about.description: See app details, privacy basics, and the project link in one place.

data.title: Data & Storage
data.description: Reset and manage your local data.

clear_financial.label: Clear all financial data
clear_financial.description: Permanently deletes all accounts, transactions, transfers, and budgets. Your preferences are kept.

confirm.title: Clear all financial data?
confirm.body: This will permanently delete all accounts, transactions, transfers, budgets, and categories you have created. This cannot be undone.

clear_financial.success: All financial data has been cleared.

factory_reset.label: Factory reset
factory_reset.description: Deletes the entire database and resets the app to its initial state. Your backups are not affected.

confirm.title: Factory reset?
confirm.body: This will delete the entire database and return the app to its initial state. Your backup files will not be affected. This cannot be undone.

data.reset_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

general.intro: These preferences update right away so the app matches how you read and review your finances.
general.currencyGroupDescription: Choose how money values appear so balances, reports, and forms stay easy to scan.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Pick the appearance that feels best for everyday use across the whole app.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the language used in navigation, labels, and messages throughout the app.

dashboardValuationMode.title: Dashboard net worth mode
dashboardValuationMode.description: Choose whether Overview net worth and allocation should include valuation snapshots when available. If disabled, those cards use ledger balances from transactions only.

currency.title: Currency symbol
currency.description: Select the symbol you want to see next to balances, transactions, and reports.

numberFormat.title: Currency display style
numberFormat.description: Choose the separators used in amounts so entries and reports match what you expect.
numberFormat.previewDescription: Preview the current symbol and number style before you keep entering data.

about.localFirst: Boring Balance is a personal finance tracker built for privacy. Your data stays on your device, and the app uses it only to show your balances and insights.
about.openSourceNote: The core app is open source, so you can review the project or follow its development from the repository below.

runtime.title: Runtime
runtime.description: Renderer runtime versions exposed through the Electron bridge.

page.title: Data & Backups
page.description: Manage local backups and prepare for sync and import/export features.

destination.title: Backup destination
destination.description: Turn on backups and choose where recovery copies should be saved.

backups.disabledInfo: Turn on backups to create recovery copies automatically, run one on demand, and keep restore points ready.

warnings.missingFolder: Backups are enabled but no backup folder is configured yet.

autoBackup.title: Automatic backups
autoBackup.description: Choose how often the app saves recovery copies and how many older copies it should keep.

manual.title: Manual backup and status
manual.description: Create a backup now and review the latest backup result in one place.

list.title: Available backups
list.description: Review saved backups, then restore or remove the ones you no longer need.
list.empty: No backups here yet. Run a backup to create your first restore point.

restoreAlert.title: Restore backup
restoreAlert.description: Restore "{{fileName}}" and replace your current data with that saved copy. Continue?

deleteAlert.title: Delete backup
deleteAlert.description: Delete "{{fileName}}" from your backup folder. You will not be able to restore from it afterward.

sync.title: Sync

overview.title: External folder sync
overview.description: Use a folder you already keep in sync between devices, such as a cloud drive, NAS, or USB drive.
overview.warning: Choose a sync folder you trust. The app keeps working from your device and uses the shared folder only to exchange copies safely.

enableHints.turnOnFirst: Turn on sync first, then choose the folder you want to use across devices.
enableHints.ready: Sync is ready to connect. Choose the folder you want this device to use.

setup.title: Connect a sync folder
setup.description: Pick the shared folder, then either create a new sync space or connect to one that already exists.

rootFolder.title: 1. Choose a root folder
rootFolder.description: Pick an existing folder or create a new one. Boring Balance will place its own sync folder inside it.

create.title: 2. Create on the first device
create.description: Use Create when this device should publish the first sync data into that folder.

attach.title: 3. Connect on other devices
attach.description: Use Connect when another device already created the sync folder and this device should join it.

status.chooseFirst: Choose a root folder to continue.
status.exists: An existing sync space was found in this folder. Use Connect if another device already uses it.
status.missing: No sync space was found in this folder yet. Use Create if this is your first synced device.
status.repoPathPending: The app sync folder will appear here after the root folder is checked.
status.waitingForFolder: Choose a root folder to continue.

setup.actionHelp: Create starts sync from this device. Connect joins a sync space that another device already created.

sync.disabledInfo: Turn on sync to choose a shared folder and connect this device.

autoSync.title: Automatic sync
autoSync.description: Set how often the app checks for newer data and how often it shares your latest changes.
autoSync.autoPushOnQuitHint: When enabled, the app shares your latest changes before you close it.

manual.title: Manual sync
manual.description: Use these actions when you want to check or share changes immediately.

tooltips.syncNow: Checks for newer shared data first, then shares this device if needed.
tooltips.pullNow: Brings in newer shared data without sending this device's changes.
tooltips.pushNow: Shares this device's latest changes without checking for newer shared data first.

hints.syncNow: Sync now is the safest full check: it looks for newer shared changes, then shares yours if needed.
hints.pullNow: Pull now only brings in newer shared data to this device.
hints.pushNow: Push now only shares this device's current changes to the shared folder.

status.title: Status
status.description: Check the current sync state and see when this device last pulled or pushed.

alerts.conflictHint: Your local copy was kept, and the shared copy was opened so you can review the difference.

attachAlert.title: Connect existing sync space
attachAlert.description: Connecting can replace this device's current data if the shared folder is newer. Continue?

overview.description: Keep a clear Excel copy of your data, or start from the official template when you want to bring information in safely.

export.title: Export
export.description: Save a clean Excel copy of your activity and setup so you can review it, share it, or keep it for later.

import.title: Import from Excel template
import.description: Start with the official template, review everything first, and import only when the file is ready.
import.warning: Imports are validated first. If errors exist, nothing is imported.

template.title: Import template
template.description: Download the Excel template, fill it in at your pace, then come back here to import it.

messages.error: Failed to save the import template.

actions.title: Import data file
actions.description: Pick the completed workbook, check any issues the app finds, and import only when everything looks right.

validation.previewDescription: These rows are ready to be imported.
validation.errorDescription: Fix the rows below and validate again before importing.

errors.tableDescription: Each error points to the exact worksheet row that must be fixed.

result.title: Last import result
result.description: The app will reload after a successful import.

confirm.title: Import data from Excel?
confirm.description: This will import data into your database.

messages.selectError: Failed to select an Excel file.
messages.validateError: Failed to validate the selected Excel file.

snapshotsOutdated.title: Snapshots may be outdated
snapshotsOutdated.body: Your latest snapshot is {{days}} days old. Update snapshots to keep Net Worth accurate.

netWorth.title: Total net worth
netWorth.description: See your current net worth, how it changed since last month, and how receivables or payables affect the full picture.
netWorth.allocationDescription: See which accounts make up your net worth so you can spot concentration at a glance.

tooltips.averageDailyChangePositive: Your total net worth is increasing by an average of {{value}} per day this month (vs the end of last month).
tooltips.averageDailyChangeNegative: Your total net worth is decreasing by an average of {{value}} per day this month (vs the end of last month).
tooltips.averageDailyChangeNeutral: Your total net worth is unchanged on average per day this month (vs the end of last month).

valuationsOutdated.title: Valuations may be outdated
valuationsOutdated.body: Your latest valuation snapshot is {{days}} days old. Update snapshots to keep 'With valuations' accurate.

netWorth.emptyDistribution: No account balances to split yet. Add or update accounts to see the allocation.

monthlyTotals.title: Income, expenses and net cashflow
monthlyTotals.descriptionCurrentYear: Compare income, expenses, and net cashflow month by month across {{year}}.
monthlyTotals.empty: No analytics data available for the selected filters.

activity.title: Activity
activity.latestTransactions: Latest {{count}} transactions this month so you can review new spending and income quickly.
activity.latestTransfers: Latest {{count}} transfers this month so you can verify money moved between accounts.

recentTransactions.title: Last transactions
recentTransactions.empty: No transactions this month yet. Add one to start building your activity feed.

moneyFlowSankey.title: Money flow
moneyFlowSankey.description: {{month}} at a glance: see where money came from, where it went, and what remained.
moneyFlowSankey.empty: No money flow for this month yet. Add transactions to see where money moved.

averageMode.label: Use elapsed months for averages
averageMode.hint: Turn this on to compare against the months that have happened so far instead of averaging across the full year.

showAllocationTargets.label: Show savings, brokerage and crypto flows
showAllocationTargets.hint: Hide these to focus on core income versus expenses, or show them to include savings and investment moves.

moneyFlow.empty: No money flow for this year yet. Add transactions to see how money moved over time.

monthlyTrend.title: {{label}} by month
monthlyTrend.description: See when {{label}} rises, dips, or stays steady across the year.

monthlyByCategory.title: {{label}} by category
monthlyByCategory.description: Compare how each month's {{label}} is split across categories.

compare.loadingDescription: Gathering both months so you can compare them side by side.
compare.empty: No comparison data for these months yet. Record activity in both months to compare them here.

summary.title: Comparison summary
summary.description: Compare income, expenses, and net cashflow side by side to see which month changed more.

radar.title: Radar comparison
radar.description: See which expense categories grew, shrank, or stayed similar across the two months.
radar.empty: No expense categories available for radar comparison.

dailyCalendar.title: Daily expense calendar
dailyCalendar.description: See which days carried the heaviest spending in each month with one shared scale.
dailyCalendar.empty: No daily spending data for the selected months.

expensesByCategory.title: Expenses by category
expensesByCategory.description: Review each category side by side, including the difference between the two months.
expensesByCategory.empty: No expense category totals for the selected months.

exclude.name: Exclude
exclude.description: Transactions excluded from analytics and budget calculations.

transfer.name: Transfer
transfer.description: Money moved between your own accounts.

table.description: Set up the accounts that hold your money or debt so balances and transfers stay organized.
table.emptyMessage: No accounts yet. Add your first account to start tracking balances and transfers.

add.title: Add account
add.description: Create an account you can use in transactions, transfers, and net worth tracking.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before creating the account.
errors.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 64 characters.
errors.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 50 characters.

edit.title: Edit account
edit.description: Update how this account appears and where you use it across the app.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving the account.

archiveAlert.title: Archive account?
archiveAlert.description: Archive "{{name}}" so it no longer appears in new entries. Existing history will keep the account name.

table.description: Organize transactions into categories so reports, budgets, and comparisons stay meaningful.
table.emptyMessage: No categories yet. Add your first category to organize spending and income.

add.title: Add category
add.description: Create a category to label transactions and group them in reports.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before creating the category.
errors.nameMinLength: Name must be at least 2 characters.
errors.nameMaxLength: Name must be at most 64 characters.
errors.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 50 characters.

edit.title: Edit category
edit.description: Update this category's label, type, or visual marker.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving the category.

archiveAlert.title: Archive category?
archiveAlert.description: Archive "{{name}}" so it no longer appears in new entries. Existing history will keep the category name.

table.description: Set spending targets by category so you can compare your plan against real spending.
table.emptyMessage: No budgets yet. Add your first budget to start tracking category targets.

add.title: Add budget
add.description: Create a spending target for {{year}} so you can measure category spending against it.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before creating the budget.
errors.amountInvalid: Amount must be a positive number.
errors.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 75 characters.

edit.title: Edit budget
edit.description: Update this category target for {{year}} as your plan changes.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving the budget.

deleteAlert.title: Delete budget?
deleteAlert.description: Delete the budget for "{{category}}". You can add it again later if needed.

analysis.title: Budget analysis
analysis.description: Compare budget targets against actual category expenses for the selected year.
analysis.empty: No budget analysis for {{year}} yet. Add budgets and matching transactions to compare plan versus actual.

chart.title: Budget vs expenses by category
chart.description: See which categories are on track, close to the limit, or already over budget.

table.description: Track money moved between your own accounts. Transfers change where money sits, not your spending totals.
table.emptyMessage: No transfers yet. Add one when you move money between your own accounts.

add.title: Add transfer
add.description: Move money between two of your accounts without affecting income or expense totals.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before creating the transfer.
errors.accountsMustDiffer: Source and destination accounts must be different.
errors.amountInvalid: Amount must be a positive number.
errors.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 75 characters.

edit.title: Edit transfer
edit.description: Update this transfer so your account movement history stays accurate.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving the transfer.

deleteAlert.title: Delete transfer?
deleteAlert.description: Delete this transfer from your history. This cannot be undone.

filters.title: Filter transfers
filters.description: Narrow the transfer list to the dates, amounts, or accounts you want to review.

empty.account: No accounts yet. Add an account before filtering transfers.

table.description: Review the income and expense entries that affect balances, budgets, and net cashflow.
table.emptyMessage: No transactions yet. Add one to start tracking spending, income, and net cashflow.

filters.title: Filter transactions
filters.description: Narrow the list to the dates, categories, accounts, or amounts you want to review.

empty.category: No categories yet. Add a category before filtering transactions.
empty.account: No accounts yet. Add an account before filtering transactions.

add.title: Add transaction
add.description: Record an income or expense so it appears in balances, budgets, and reports.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before creating the transaction.
errors.amountInvalid: Amount must be a valid number.
errors.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 75 characters.

edit.title: Edit transaction
edit.description: Update the details behind this income or expense entry.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving the transaction.

deleteAlert.title: Delete transaction?
deleteAlert.description: Delete this transaction from your history. This cannot be undone.

duplicateAlert.title: Duplicate transaction?
duplicateAlert.description: Create a copy of this transaction so you can edit it instead of entering everything again.

table.description: Plan repeating transactions and transfers so routine activity stays easier to keep up with.
table.emptyMessage: No recurring events yet. Add one to automate repeated transactions or transfers.

schedule.monthPolicy: If the day is not in the month: {{policy}}

monthPolicy.clip: Use the last valid day of the month

add.title: Add recurring event
add.description: Create a repeating rule so the app can add upcoming transactions or transfers for you.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before creating the recurring event.
errors.titleMinLength: Title must be at least 2 characters.
errors.titleMaxLength: Title must be at most 80 characters.
errors.countInvalid: Occurrences count must be a positive integer.
errors.frequencyIntervalInvalid: Frequency interval must be a positive integer.
errors.accountsMustDiffer: Source and destination accounts must be different.
errors.amountInvalid: Amount must be a positive number.
errors.descriptionMaxLength: Description must be at most 75 characters.

edit.title: Edit recurring event
edit.description: Update this rule and keep future planned items aligned with it.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the highlighted fields before saving the recurring event.

labels.title: Title
labels.monthPolicy: If the day is not in the month

tooltips.scheduleLockedAfterCreate: After you create it, the schedule stays fixed so generated dates remain predictable.

deleteAlert.title: Delete recurring event?
deleteAlert.description: Delete "{{title}}" and stop creating future items from this rule.

options.deleteLinkedItems: Also delete linked items already created by this plan
options.deleteLinkedItemsHint: This also removes the transactions or transfers that were already created from this rule.

runConfirm.title: Run recurring event?
runConfirm.description: Generate any missing scheduled items for "{{title}}" now.

updateResult.title: Recurring event updated
updateResult.description: "{{title}}" was updated successfully. Linked generated items were updated where applicable.

hints.noNewItems: No new items were created because all scheduled dates already had linked items.

runError.title: Failed to run recurring event
runError.description: The recurring event could not be executed: {{error}}

errors.loadUnexpected: Unexpected error while loading recurring events.

table.description: History of valuation snapshots for this account.
table.emptyMessage: No valuation snapshots yet. Add your first snapshot to start tracking.

header.noSnapshots: Add your first snapshot to compare against your account balance.

chart.title: Value over time
chart.description: Trend of saved valuation snapshots for this account.

add.title: Add snapshot
add.description: Record the current value of your account at a specific date.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the errors above before saving.
errors.createFailed: Failed to create the snapshot. Please try again.
errors.valueInvalid: Value must be a valid positive number.

edit.title: Edit snapshot
edit.description: Update the value or date of this valuation snapshot.

errors.fixValidation: Please fix the errors above before saving.
errors.updateFailed: Failed to update the snapshot. Please try again.

deleteAlert.title: Delete snapshot
deleteAlert.description: Are you sure you want to delete this valuation snapshot? This action cannot be undone.

welcome.title: Welcome to Boring Balance
welcome.subtitle: A simple, private place to track where your money goes. No cloud, no subscriptions, no noise.

preferences.title: Set your preferences
preferences.subtitle: You can change these at any time in Settings.

currency.label: Default currency
currency.hint: Used for display and new accounts. You can override per account.

start.title: How do you want to begin?

scratch.title: Start fresh
scratch.description: Set up your accounts and categories. Takes two minutes.

import.title: Import a backup
import.description: Restore from a previous Boring Balance export.

confirm.title: You're set up.
confirm.subtitle: Everything is saved locally on your device. You're in control.
confirm.import_note: You can import your backup from Settings → Export & Import at any time.
